title: senecio sandersii
intro: Senecio sandersii, also known as Sanderson's groundsel, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the southwestern United States. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Senecio sandersii include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to address various health concerns.
